```python
mask = 0b101
total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    a = int(s[:3], 2)
    b = int(s[3:], 2)
    assert b == (a ^ mask), (bitstring, a, b)
    total += count
assert total == shots
assert len(counts) > 0
```

```python
offset = 0b101  # second register = first register XOR 101

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

seen_first = set()
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    assert c >= 0
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    first = int(s[3:], 2)
    second = int(s[:3], 2)
    assert second == (first ^ offset)
    seen_first.add(first)

assert seen_first == set(range(8))
```

```python
flip_mask = "101"
total = 0

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    reg_a = s[:3]
    reg_b = s[3:]
    expected_b = "".join("1" if reg_a[i] != flip_mask[i] else "0" for i in range(3))
    assert reg_b == expected_b, f"invalid correlated outcome: {bitstring}"
    total += c

assert total == shots
assert len(counts) > 0
```

```python
expected_pairs = {
    "000": "101",
    "001": "100",
    "010": "111",
    "011": "110",
    "100": "001",
    "101": "000",
    "110": "011",
    "111": "010",
}

total = 0
seen_pairs = set()

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert isinstance(bitstring, str)
    assert len(bitstring) == 6
    left = bitstring[:3]
    right = bitstring[3:]
    assert left in expected_pairs, f"Unexpected left register: {left}"
    assert right == expected_pairs[left], f"Invalid register relation for {bitstring}"
    assert count > 0
    total += count
    seen_pairs.add((left, right))

assert total == shots, f"Counts sum {total} != shots {shots}"
assert seen_pairs <= set(expected_pairs.items())
assert len(seen_pairs) > 0
```

```python
width = metadata.get("REGISTER_WIDTH", 3) if isinstance(metadata, dict) else 3
mask = (1 << width) - 1
flip = int("101", 2)

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 2 * width
    left = int(s[:width], 2)
    right = int(s[width:], 2)
    assert right == (left ^ flip)

assert len(counts) > 0
observed_left = {int(bitstring.replace(" ", "")[:width], 2) for bitstring in counts}
for left in observed_left:
    expected = format(left, "0{}b".format(width)) + format(left ^ flip, "0{}b".format(width))
    assert expected in {k.replace(" ", "") for k in counts}
```

```python
expected_xor = "101"
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    a = s[:3]
    b = s[3:]
    xor_bits = "".join("1" if x != y else "0" for x, y in zip(a, b))
    assert xor_bits == expected_xor

assert len(counts) > 0
observed_first = {bitstring.replace(" ", "")[:3] for bitstring in counts}
assert len(observed_first) >= 2
```

```python
mask = 0b101  # x applied to qubits 3 and 5, so second register = first register XOR 101

total = 0
seen_first = set()

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6, f"Expected 6 measured bits, got {bitstring!r}"
    first = int(s[-3:], 2)
    second = int(s[:3], 2)
    assert second == (first ^ mask), f"Invalid register relation for {bitstring!r}"
    total += count
    seen_first.add(first)

assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} != shots {shots}"
assert len(counts) == 8, f"Expected exactly 8 valid output pairs, got {len(counts)}"
assert seen_first == set(range(8)), f"Expected full support over first register, got {seen_first}"
```

```python
expected_xor = "101"
total = 0

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6, f"Expected 6 measured bits, got {bitstring!r}"
    left = s[:3]
    right = s[3:]
    xor_bits = "".join("1" if a != b else "0" for a, b in zip(left, right))
    assert xor_bits == expected_xor, f"Register pair {left}, {right} violates fixed bitwise relation"
    total += count

assert total == shots, f"Counts sum {total} does not match shots {shots}"
assert len(counts) > 0, "No measurement outcomes found"
```

```python
expected_xor = "101"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Total counts {total} != shots {shots}"

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6, f"Expected 6-bit outcomes, got {bitstring!r}"
    a = s[:3]
    b = s[3:]
    xor = "".join("1" if x != y else "0" for x, y in zip(a, b))
    assert xor == expected_xor, f"Outcome {bitstring!r} violates relation: {a} xor {b} = {xor}, expected {expected_xor}"
    assert count > 0
```

```python
offset = "101"
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

observed = set()
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    a = s[:3]
    b = s[3:]
    expected_b = "".join("1" if x != y else "0" for x, y in zip(a, offset))
    assert b == expected_b
    observed.add((a, b))
    assert c > 0

assert len(observed) == 8
assert {a for a, _ in observed} == {
    "000", "001", "010", "011", "100", "101", "110", "111"
}
```

```python
flip_mask = 0b101  # x applied to qubits 3 and 5, so second register = first register XOR 101
total = 0
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    a = int(s[-3:], 2)
    b = int(s[:-3], 2)
    assert b == (a ^ flip_mask), (bitstring, a, b)
    total += c

assert total == shots
assert len(counts) > 0
```

```python
expected_pairs = {
    "000": "101",
    "001": "100",
    "010": "111",
    "011": "110",
    "100": "001",
    "101": "000",
    "110": "011",
    "111": "010",
}

total = 0
seen_first = set()

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    first, second = s[:3], s[3:]
    assert first in expected_pairs
    assert second == expected_pairs[first]
    seen_first.add(first)
    total += c

assert total == shots
assert seen_first == set(expected_pairs.keys())
```

```python
observed = set()

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert count >= 0
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    c2, c1, c0, t2, t1, t0 = s
    control = c2 + c1 + c0
    target = t2 + t1 + t0
    expected_target = "".join("1" if b != f else "0" for b, f in zip(control, "101"))
    assert target == expected_target, (bitstring, control, target, expected_target)
    observed.add((control, target))

assert len(observed) == 8
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots
```

```python
observed = set(counts)

assert observed, "counts must be non-empty"

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    assert c >= 0
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6, f"unexpected bitstring length: {bitstring}"
    left = s[:3]
    right = s[3:]
    expected_right = "".join("1" if b == "0" else "0" for b in (left[0] + "0" + left[2]))
    assert right == expected_right, f"invalid register relation for {bitstring}: expected {left + expected_right}"

assert sum(counts.values()) == shots
```

```python
mask = 0b101
total = 0

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    c = int(s, 2)
    reg_a = c & 0b111
    reg_b = (c >> 3) & 0b111
    assert reg_b == (reg_a ^ mask), f"Invalid correlated outcome: {s}"
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert total > 0
```

```python
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    a = s[-3:]   # bits from qubits 0,1,2
    b = s[:3]    # bits from qubits 3,4,5
    expected_b = "".join("1" if x != y else "0" for x, y in zip(a, "101"))
    assert b == expected_b, (bitstring, a, b, expected_b)
    assert c > 0

observed_a = {bitstring.replace(" ", "")[-3:] for bitstring in counts}
assert observed_a == {"000", "001", "010", "011", "100", "101", "110", "111"}
assert len(counts) == 8
```

```python
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots

seen_first = set()
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    assert c >= 0
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6
    first = s[-3:]
    second = s[-6:-3]
    expected_second = "".join("1" if b == "0" else "0" for b in first)
    expected_second = expected_second[0] + first[1] + expected_second[2]
    assert second == expected_second
    seen_first.add(first)

assert seen_first == {"000", "001", "010", "011", "100", "101", "110", "111"}
assert len(counts) == 8
```

```python
expected_pairs = {
    "000": "101",

    "100": "001",
    "101": "000",
    "110": "011",
    "111": "010",
}

seen_left = set()
total = 0

for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = bitstring.replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == 6, f"expected 6 measured bits, got {bitstring!r}"
    left, right = s[:3], s[3:]
    assert left in expected_pairs, f"unexpected left register {left!r}"
    assert right == expected_pairs[left], f"register relation violated for {bitstring!r}"
    seen_left.add(left)
    total += c

assert total == shots, f"total counts {total} != shots {shots}"
assert set(counts.keys()) and len(seen_left) >= 2, "observed support should include multiple valid register pairs"
```
